title: U.S. Corn and Soybean Stocks Down from 2011, USDA Reports
summary: As of September 1, there were 988 million bushels of corn and 169 million bushels of soybeans in storage, according to the quarterly Grain Stocks report released today by the USDA's National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS). By September 1, there were 314 million bushels of corn stored on U.S....
